headline: How Can CME Group (CME) Be an Alternative to Correlation Risk?
summary: Cooper Investors, an investment management firm, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for “Cooper Investors Global Equities Fund (Unhedged)”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The portfolio returned -9.2% in the quarter, bringing the year-to-date return to -12.2%. Currency movements negatively impacted returns by about 6%. The risk of AI disruption […]

headline: EXCLUSIVE: From Nvidia Earnings To Fed Decisions, Kalshi Sees Prediction Markets Going Mainstream
summary: Kalshi says prediction markets are evolving into mainstream Wall Street: spanning Nvidia earnings, Fed decisions, AI regulation etc.

headline: Eris SOFR Swap Futures Open Interest Triples Ahead of June Eris Options Launch, New Funding Round
summary: CHICAGO, May 19, 2026--Eris Innovations, an intellectual property licensing company and the creator of Eris SOFR Swap futures (Eris SOFR), today announced a new investment round backed by leading trading firms, following a marked rise in Eris SOFR activity at CME Group.
